title: provider-git plugin configuration
description: Schema v1 for the provider-git semrel plugin. Configure via SEMREL_* environment variables.

SEMREL_TAG_NAME.description: Release tag name for the current semrel execution.

SEMREL_BRANCH.description: Release branch name for the current semrel execution.

SEMREL_REMOTE.description: Fallback git remote name used when SEMREL_PLUGIN_REMOTE is unset.

SEMREL_DRY_RUN.description: When true, perform validation and logging only without executing side effects.
